full_text:
Yuan Yuanchang 袁元長
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Yuanchang (袁元長)was born in Ruyang county, Runan commandery. From Yang province went to central China and was welcomed by Cao Cao. Yuan Yuanchang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
